name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in a comp claim near Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in a comp claim near Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on medical, wages, disability rating, future loss; attorney maximizes.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical costs, lost wages, disability rating, age, occupation under Utah law.[4] Includes temp/permanent disability, retraining if needed.[2] Key factors: AMA impairment rating key; future earnings loss factored; settlements vary widely.[4] Track all bills/wages lost, get full treatment, attorney negotiates max value vs insurer lowballs.[3] Free eval estimates your case.

description: Based on medical, wages, disability rating, future loss; attorney maximizes.[2][4]
